name: Panopto Public API
description: The public API for Panopto. OpenID & OAuth information can be found at Panopto/oauth2/.well-known/openid-configuration

potentialAction.name: Auth_LegacyLogin
potentialAction.description: Get a legacy authentication cookie

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_RegisterRemoteRecorder
potentialAction.description: Register a new remote recorder

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_Connect
potentialAction.description: Connect as the provided remote recorder

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_Disconnect
potentialAction.description: Disconnect as the provided remote recorder, identified via the GUID public id

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_Heartbeat
potentialAction.description: Heartbeat and preview as the provided remote recorder

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_GetSchedule
potentialAction.description: Retrieve a schedule for the next 7 days for the provided remote recorder.As a best practice a new scheduled should be fetched every day even if the schedule version in the heartbeat hasn't changed

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_UpdateSchedule
potentialAction.description: Update or add a set of scheduled recordings for the provided remote recorder. To add a scheduled recording, the recording should have all relevant fields filled in but an empty (all zeros) guid

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_Error
potentialAction.description: Register an error with the provided remote recorder on the server

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_LegacyLogin
potentialAction.description: Retrieve a legacy ASPXAUTH cookie

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_PauseRecording
potentialAction.description: Pause the recording of the specified session on the server

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_ResumeRecording
potentialAction.description: Resume the recording of the specified session on the server

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_ReportRemoteRecorderURLs
potentialAction.description: Provides a list of URLs and URL types to present to administrators to help them manage this remote recorder.Calling this replaces all previously reported URLs. URLs are preserved until replaced, so this only needs to be called when they have changed

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_WebRtcConnect
potentialAction.description: Establishes a new connection which enables the WebRTC-based media preview feature.  After this, the client should commence WebRTC session negotiation by sending us an SDP offer.

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_WebRtcDisconnect
potentialAction.description: Destroys the connection which enables the WebRTC-based media preview feature.

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_WebRtcGetEvents
potentialAction.description: After the client has sent us an SDP offer, they should poll this  endpoint periodically to receive messages.

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_WebRtcIceCandidates
potentialAction.description: Sends a batch of ICE candidates from client to signaling server.

potentialAction.name: RemoteRecorderAPI_WebRtcSdpOffer
potentialAction.description: The client begins WebRTC session negotiation by submitting an SDP offer.

potentialAction.name: Accessibility_PreviewBulkAccessibility
potentialAction.description: Preview bulk accessibility request eligibility

potentialAction.name: Accessibility_ScheduleBulkAccessibility
potentialAction.description: Schedule bulk accessibility requests

potentialAction.name: CaptionProviders_GetCaptionProviders
potentialAction.description: Get caption providers

potentialAction.name: Reports_GetReportFromId
potentialAction.description: Get a report by Id
